subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Divine Tree of Love! I bear witness that thou hast turned unto God and quaffed the pure wine of revelation when the handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه سدره الوداد اشهد انک اقبلت الی الله و شربت رحیق الوحی اذ کانت الاماء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
